meta.title: Aethos — Modern websites and smart systems for growing businesses
meta.description: We help clinics, restaurants, real-estate agencies and small B2B teams look more professional online, capture more leads, and save hours every week.

hero.h1Before: Modern websites and smart systems for
hero.subtitle: We help clinics, restaurants, real-estate agencies and small B2B teams look more professional online, capture more leads, and save hours every week.

problems.h2: Most small businesses face the same problems.
problems.subtitle: None of these are unique to your business. And none of them require complicated technology to fix.

items.title: Your website doesn't reflect your business
items.body: It loads slowly, looks dated, and clients judge you before they ever call. First impressions matter.

items.title: Client requests get lost
items.body: Messages pile up across WhatsApp, email and Instagram. Nobody knows what needs following up.

items.title: Everything runs on spreadsheets
items.body: Clients, quotes, bookings — all in one Excel file that only one person understands.

items.title: People can't find you on Google
items.body: Even people who already know your name struggle to find you. New customers? Even harder.

items.title: You're losing clients without knowing it
items.body: Forms go to a forgotten inbox. Calls aren't returned. People just book the next business on the list.

items.title: Hours lost to repetitive tasks
items.body: Confirming bookings, sending reminders, answering the same questions. Every. Single. Day.

solutions.h2: Everything your business needs to look good, get found, and run smoothly.
solutions.subtitle: No jargon. No unnecessary complexity. Just the right tools for where your business is right now.

transform.h2Without: How it looks without the right tools.
transform.h2With: How it looks with the right tools.
transform.subtitle: Small changes to how your business operates online can make a huge difference — without changing how you work.
before: An outdated website that loses you clients
Hours every day on tasks that should be automatic
after: A modern website that works for your business 24/7
Every client request in one organized place
Automatic replies that confirm the basics instantly
A clear view of what's happening in your business
Showing up when people search for what you do

cta.subtitle: A 30-minute call. No sales pitch. We listen, ask a few questions, and tell you honestly whether we can help.

footer.tagline: Modern websites and smart systems for businesses that want to grow without the complexity.
footer.copyright: © {year} Aethos Solutions. Made in Barcelona & Bucharest.

services.h1: Everything your business needs to look good, get found, and run smoothly.
services.subtitle: No jargon. No unnecessary systems. We focus on what will actually move the needle for your business right now.
services.ctaHero: Talk to us about your business

howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.subtitle: Simple, fast and focused on your business — not on complicated processes.

steps.title: We listen first
steps.desc: A 30-minute conversation to understand your business, your problems and what would actually make a difference.

steps.title: We build what fits
steps.desc: Not a standard template or a bloated system. Only what your business needs right now.

steps.title: You launch and grow
steps.desc: We hand everything over clearly. You own it completely. We stay available when you need us.

notSure.title: Not sure which services you need?
notSure.subtitle: Tell us about your business and we'll suggest exactly what makes sense for where you are right now.

items.title: Web Design
items.problem: Your current website looks old, loads slowly, or doesn't represent your business well.
items.solution: A fast, modern website that reflects your business and gives visitors a reason to contact you.

items.title: Landing Pages
items.problem: You run promotions, ads or campaigns but have nowhere dedicated to send people.
items.solution: Purpose-built pages for specific offers, services or campaigns — designed to convert.

items.title: SEO & Local Search
items.problem: People in your area are searching for what you do — but they're finding your competitors instead.
items.solution: We help your business show up in local search results and Google Maps for the right keywords.

items.title: Smart Contact Forms
items.problem: Inquiries get lost across WhatsApp, email and Instagram. Nobody knows who replied to what.
items.solution: One smart form that routes requests to the right place and sends an instant acknowledgement.

items.title: Lead Organization
items.problem: Your client list lives in a WhatsApp group, three spreadsheets, and someone's memory.
items.solution: A simple, organized view of every lead and client — who they are, where they came from, what's next.

items.title: Practical Automations
items.problem: You spend hours confirming bookings, sending reminders, and answering the same questions.
items.solution: Quiet systems that handle the repetitive stuff automatically — so you don't have to.

items.title: Business Dashboards
items.problem: You don't know how many leads you have, where they come from, or what's actually working.
items.solution: A simple overview of what matters: leads, bookings, follow-ups — all in one screen.
outcomes: See your business at a glance

work.subtitle: We work with small businesses across Spain and Romania. Here's what changes when they get the right tools.

cta.title: Your business could be next.
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your business and we'll show you what's possible for where you are right now.

about.h1: We build websites and systems for businesses that have better things to do than manage spreadsheets.
about.body1: Aethos is a small digital studio focused on one thing: helping real businesses look more professional online, get more clients, and stop losing time to repetitive manual work.
about.body2: We're based in Barcelona and Bucharest, and we work with businesses across Spain, Romania and beyond. We speak English, Spanish and Romanian — and we speak business.

approach.title: How we're different
approach.subtitle: We're not a large agency with account managers and project trackers. We're a small team that cares about building things that actually work.

values.title: We listen before we build
values.desc: Every business is different. We ask questions, understand your situation, and only suggest what will actually make a difference for you — not what's trendy.

values.title: Fast, practical, no fluff
values.desc: We move quickly and focus on what works. No 3-month discovery phases. No unnecessary complexity. You see results in weeks, not quarters.

values.title: You own everything, always
values.desc: Your website, your domain, your data. No lock-in, no hostage fees. If you ever want to leave, you take everything with you. No questions asked.

cta.title: Want to work together?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your business. A 30-minute call, no pressure, and we'll tell you honestly what we can do.

contact.subtitle: Tell us what you're working on. We'll ask a few questions and tell you honestly whether we can help.

steps.title: We read your message
steps.desc: Same day, usually within a few hours.

steps.title: 30-minute call
steps.desc: We listen to your situation, ask a few questions. No sales pitch.

steps.title: We send a plan
steps.desc: A clear proposal within 48 hours — what we'd do, how long, and what it costs.

contact.responseValue: Same day, usually within a few hours

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business and what you'd like to improve or build...
form.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. We'll read your message today and get back to you within a few hours.
form.disclaimer: We read every message and reply within 24 hours.
